title: Hardest Minecraft
description: A way to spice up your experience
body:
I lost the code

A mod that adds five new mobs and one new item.
1. Destroyer:
This monster will hunt down anything it sees and will chase forever. It boasts lots of confidence and can be seen dueling its own kind.
   ![The Destroyer](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/06756644e29e6acb8a0e2128bda890c364b85240.png)
2. Wrecker:
This monster looks similar to the Destroyer but instead of hunting down every mob in sight, it will destroy any easy to mine block like dirt underneath it.
![The Wrecker](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/c175940353001829c996b23699dd3643a4887572.png)
3. Flying Destroyer:
This flying monster is if the Destroyer sprouted wings and began to fly.
![The Flying Destroyer](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/57c854ee9b297e5696aed961e62cdeed2aa601da.png)
4. Aqua Destroyer:
Like the regular Destroyer, it chases down anything it sees. However this one lives in the water and wields a trident and throws it at high speeds.
![The Aqua Destroyer in it's habitat](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/fcc367629baf382afeec0d74ff6b7c9dd5cbc723_0.webp)
5. Mr. Boom:
Mr. Boom's name is what it suggests. He carrys a explosive and will throw them at players and villagers.
![Mr. Boom doing what he does best](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/35ec7fb0e97a170f1f4d4ca9d72e3d81f930a805.png)
